title: BETTER grindstone
description:
You can repair items by polishing them with a grindstone.
Can be configured using a new attribute.
body:
### You can repair items by polishing them with a grindstone.
![polishing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d70ba518dbc7ff9c43d268b9c497b919947a9c.gif)
## atributes
polishing efficiency (default:1)
